name: oyster-skills
description: A chain of Claude Code skills for taking a feature from idea to shipped code, with human review gates between phases.

plugins.name: oyster
plugins.description: Seven skills (brainstorming → spec → impl plan → test review → implementation → post-implementation review) plus an optional roast-me adversarial review. Each planning phase produces an HTML preview with inline-comment support, backed by a small local review server.
